remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document to a new file.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
remove-all-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Iterates through PDF files in a specified directory, binds each to a PdfAnnotationEditor, deletes every annotation, and overwrites the original file with the cleaned version.

delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove only text (sticky note) annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-link-annotations-from-pdf-pages.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific PDF Pages
remove-link-annotations-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete link annotations on pages 3‑7 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

delete-named-annotation.title: Delete a Named Annotation from a PDF
delete-named-annotation.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation identified by its name from a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation from a PDF by passing its name or ID to the DeleteAnnotation method of the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Memory Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to export annotations from pages 1‑2 of a PDF to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and a memory stream for further processing.

export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to filter Highlight annotations in a PDF and export them to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor ExportAnnotationsXfdf overload.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into a PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated document.

import-xfdf-annotations-to-specific-page.title: Import XFDF Annotations to Specific PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-to-specific-page.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file onto a selected page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

import-annotations-without-overwrite.title: Import Annotations Without Overwriting Existing Ones
import-annotations-without-overwrite.description: Shows how to import selected annotations from multiple source PDFs into a target PDF while preserving any annotations already present by disabling the overwrite option.

flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non‑Editable Content
flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations in a PDF, turning them into static page graphics, and then save the result.

flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations on the first five pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace the author of annotations on a given page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

modify-annotation-subject-color.title: Update Annotation Subject and Color in PDF
modify-annotation-subject-color.description: Shows how to change the subject and color of a text annotation by creating a new TextAnnotation and applying it with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

set-annotation-open-flag.title: Set Annotation Open Flag for All PDF Annotations
set-annotation-open-flag.description: Shows how to iterate through every page and annotation in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and set the Open property of TextAnnotation and PopupAnnotation objects to true.

update-annotation-modified-date.title: Update Annotation Modified Date in PDF
update-annotation-modified-date.description: Shows how to set the Modified property of a TextAnnotation to the current system time and apply the change to a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

apply-read-only-flag-to-pdf-annotation.title: Apply Read‑Only Flag to a PDF Annotation
apply-read-only-flag-to-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to set the ReadOnly flag on a PDF annotation using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API and save the updated document.

batch-update-annotation-author.title: Batch Update Annotation Author Across PDFs
batch-update-annotation-author.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, bind each to PdfAnnotationEditor, and replace the author of all annotations with a new value, saving the results to a separate folder.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, export all its annotations to XFDF, and return the XFDF data as a byte array.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF stream into a PDF opened from a FileStream using Aspose.Pdf, avoiding temporary files.

fluent-deletion-and-flattening-of-pdf-an.title: Fluent Deletion and Flattening of PDF Annotations
fluent-deletion-and-flattening-of-pdf-an.description: Shows how to delete all annotations, flatten any remaining ones, and save the PDF using a fluent wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

validate-exported-xfdf-against-schema.title: Validate Exported XFDF Against Schema
validate-exported-xfdf-against-schema.description: Exports PDF annotations to an XFDF file and validates the generated XFDF against the XFDF XSD schema.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete All Annotations from a PDF and Verify Count
delete-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to count annotations on each page, remove all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and confirm the deletion by recounting.

extract-pdf-annotation-details.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details into Custom Objects
extract-pdf-annotation-details.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, extracting all annotations across pages, and mapping each annotation's name, type, and rectangle into a custom C# class.

extract-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Log to JSON
extract-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, gather key properties, serialize them to indented JSON, and write an audit log file.

delete-annotation-with-error-handling.title: Delete Annotation with Error Handling
delete-annotation-with-error-handling.description: Shows how to delete a PDF annotation using PdfAnnotationEditor and catch exceptions when the specified annotation does not exist.

delete-annotations-by-author.title: Delete Annotations by Author Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-annotations-by-author.description: The example loads a PDF, finds markup annotations whose author (Title) matches a specified name, and removes those annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

delete-pdf-annotations-by-rgb-color.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Specific RGB Color
delete-pdf-annotations-by-rgb-color.description: Demonstrates how to remove annotations from a PDF only when their color matches a given RGB value using Aspose.Pdf.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file with PdfAnnotationEditor and then import that XFDF into another PDF to duplicate the annotation layout.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations in a Folder
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, saving the results with a "_flattened" suffix.

batch-delete-stamp-annotations.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
batch-delete-stamp-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Demonstrates how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments into several PDF documents using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

remove-annotations-from-pdfs-in-parallel.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in Parallel
remove-annotations-from-pdfs-in-parallel.description: Shows how to delete every annotation from a collection of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor with Parallel.ForEach.

measure-annotation-flattening-performanc.title: Measure Annotation Flattening Performance on Large PDF
measure-annotation-flattening-performanc.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a 500‑page PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and measure the time taken.

list-annotation-names-in-pdf.title: List Annotation Names in a PDF
list-annotation-names-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations using Aspose.Pdf, and print each annotation's Name to the console for debugging.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete All Annotations from PDF Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with text annotations, then using PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to remove them and verifying the removal with a unit test.

retry-delete-pdf-annotation.title: Retry Deleting PDF Annotation with Rebinding
retry-delete-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and retry the operation after rebinding the document if the first attempt fails.

log-and-delete-pdf-annotations.title: Log and Delete PDF Annotations
log-and-delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF, log each annotation's name, type, and page number to a CSV file, and delete the annotations using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

delete-pdf-annotations-using-config.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using Configurable Types
delete-pdf-annotations-using-config.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration file that lists annotation types and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete those annotations (or all) from a PDF.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF file, delete all its annotations, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-remove-annotations-with-progress.title: Batch Remove Annotations from PDFs with Progress Indicator
batch-remove-annotations-with-progress.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDF files, clear all annotations from each page using Aspose.Pdf, save the cleaned PDFs, and display a console progress bar indicating the percentage completed.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.description: Demonstrates how to flatten annotations in multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor while supporting cancellation via a CancellationToken.

get-annotation-names-by-author.title: Get Annotation Names by Author
get-annotation-names-by-author.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and return the names of markup annotations whose author (Title) matches a specified string.

copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Copy Annotations from a Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a template PDF and import them into several target PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API and then validate that no annotation objects remain in the document.

batch-remove-pdf-annotations-report.title: Batch Remove PDF Annotations and Generate Report
batch-remove-pdf-annotations-report.description: Loads each PDF in a folder, counts existing annotations, deletes all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the cleaned files, and prints a summary of how many annotations were removed per document.

pdf-annotation-helper.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Managing Annotations
pdf-annotation-helper.description: Shows a reusable helper class that binds to a PDF, deletes all or specific annotations, flattens them, and saves the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-pdf-annotations.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete every annotation from a PDF stream and write the cleaned PDF back to a stream.

async-pdf-annotation-operations.title: Asynchronous PDF Annotation Operations with Aspose.Pdf
async-pdf-annotation-operations.description: Shows how to flatten, delete, import, and export PDF annotations asynchronously by wrapping Aspose.Pdf PdfAnnotationEditor calls in Task.Run.

delete-pdf-annotations.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to remove all annotations from PDF files in a specified folder by using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

log-update-annotation-modification-times.title: Log and Update Annotation Modification Timestamps
log-update-annotation-modification-times.description: Demonstrates how to read existing annotation Modified timestamps, log them, and update all annotations with a new timestamp using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

pdf-annotation-deletion-tool.title: PDF Annotation Deletion Tool with Preview
pdf-annotation-deletion-tool.description: Shows how to let a user choose annotation types, delete those annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and open a preview of the modified document.

backup-and-delete-all-annotations.title: Backup PDF and Delete All Annotations
backup-and-delete-all-annotations.description: Shows how to create a backup copy of a PDF file and then remove all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pdf-annotations-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Name (Literal and Variable)
delete-pdf-annotations-by-name.description: Demonstrates how to remove a named annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with examples that delete the annotation via a string literal and via a variable holding the name.

benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation
benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.description: Demonstrates how to measure the performance of removing all annotations with DeleteAnnotations versus removing a single annotation with DeleteAnnotation using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and log the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

extract-annotation-rectangles.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles to Visual PDF
extract-annotation-rectangles.description: Demonstrates how to read all annotations in a PDF, extract their rectangle bounds, and create a new PDF where each page visualizes one annotation rectangle with a red outline.

add-custom-annotation-flags.title: Add Custom Annotation Flags to PDF
add-custom-annotation-flags.description: Demonstrates creating a TextAnnotation, setting custom annotation flags (Print and Locked), and applying it to a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

flatten-pdf-annotations-on-network-share.title: Flatten PDF Annotations on a Network Share
flatten-pdf-annotations-on-network-share.description: Shows how to scan a network folder for PDF files and flatten all annotations in each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations-validate.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Validate Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-validate.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then verify that no annotation objects remain by scanning each page's annotation collection.

export-pdf-annotations-pretty-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-pretty-xfdf.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF, export them to XFDF, and save the XFDF with formatted (indented) XML for easier manual editing.

simplified-pdf-annotation-helper.title: Simplified PDF Annotation Helper
simplified-pdf-annotation-helper.description: Demonstrates a wrapper class that abstracts Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor and PdfContentEditor, offering easy methods to add text and markup annotations, delete annotations, and import/export them via XFDF/FDF.

pdf-utility-delete-flatten-export.title: PDF Utility for Deleting Pages, Flattening and Exporting Annotations
pdf-utility-delete-flatten-export.description: A command‑line tool that shows how to delete specific pages, flatten all annotations, and export annotations to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-annotations-to-xfdf-no-annotation.title: Export Annotations to XFDF When PDF Has No Annotations
export-annotations-to-xfdf-no-annotation.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a PDF to XFDF and verifies that an empty PDF produces a valid XFDF without any <annot> elements.

merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files into a PDF
merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.description: Shows how to import and merge several XFDF files containing form data and annotations into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

annotation-workflow-verbose-logging.title: Annotation Workflow with Verbose Logging
annotation-workflow-verbose-logging.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a text annotation, exporting and importing annotations via XFDF, flattening them, and saving the result while logging each step to a detailed log file.

get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf Facades to count the number of annotations on each page of a PDF and return the results as a dictionary.

clone-modify-pdf-annotation.title: Clone and Modify PDF Annotation
clone-modify-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to clone the first annotation on a PDF page, change its properties (color, contents, etc.), and add the modified copy back to the same page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to import annotation data from matching XFDF files into multiple PDF documents in a folder, saving the annotated PDFs to an output directory.

concurrent-pdf-delete-insert-test.title: Concurrent PDF Delete and Insert Test
concurrent-pdf-delete-insert-test.description: Demonstrates running delete and page‑import operations on the same PDF concurrently using separate PdfFileEditor instances to verify thread safety.

backup-pdf-and-flatten-form-fields.title: Backup PDF and Flatten Form Fields
backup-pdf-and-flatten-form-fields.description: Shows how to create a backup of a PDF file before flattening all form fields using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

get-pdf-annotation-counts.title: Get Annotation Counts from PDF
get-pdf-annotation-counts.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to extract all annotations from a PDF and count the occurrences of each annotation type.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-skip-reado.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Read‑Only Skip
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-skip-reado.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files to flatten their annotations using Aspose.Pdf, with a command‑line option to skip read‑only annotations.

measure-annotation-performance.title: Measure Annotation Operation Performance with Aspose.Pdf
measure-annotation-performance.description: Demonstrates how to add, modify, delete PDF annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor while logging the execution time of each operation for performance monitoring.

delete-annotations-export-xfdf.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
delete-annotations-export-xfdf.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

delete-text-annotations-with-retry.title: Delete Text Annotations with Exponential Backoff Retry
delete-text-annotations-with-retry.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding a PdfAnnotationEditor, deleting all text annotations using a retry policy with exponential backoff to handle transient file access errors, and saving the modified document.

list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotation Names and Page Numbers to CSV
list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Shows how to enumerate annotations in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve each annotation's name and its page number, and export the list to a CSV file.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Annotation via Facades
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed custom key/value pairs into a PDF annotation by modifying its dictionary using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, and optionally adds a document‑level custom property.

batch-remove-old-annotations.title: Batch Remove Old Annotations from PDFs
batch-remove-old-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder and delete annotations whose modification date is older than a given number of days, saving the cleaned PDFs to an output folder.

check-duplicate-annotation-names.title: Check Duplicate Annotation Names in PDF
check-duplicate-annotation-names.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to scan a PDF for annotations that share the same Name and log any duplicate occurrences across pages.

extract-pdf-annotations-summary.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Generate Summary Document
extract-pdf-annotations-summary.description: The example extracts annotations from a PDF using the Facades API, converts them to XFDF, builds a textual summary, and writes the summary into a new PDF document.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.title: Flatten PDF Annotations While Preserving Appearance
flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.description: Shows how to convert interactive annotations into static graphics, keeping their visual look, by using PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten annotations in a PDF document.

merge-annotations-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Merge Annotations from Multiple PDFs
merge-annotations-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to import annotation layers from several source PDFs into a target PDF and save the combined result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

pdfannotationeditor-health-check.title: PdfAnnotationEditor Health Check Binding
pdfannotationeditor-health-check.description: Demonstrates a simple health‑check that binds a PdfAnnotationEditor to a sample PDF, reads the page count, and saves the document to verify functionality.

batch-export-delete-archive-pdf-annotati.title: Batch Export, Delete, and Archive PDF Annotations to XFDF
batch-export-delete-archive-pdf-annotati.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, export all annotations to XFDF, delete the annotations, save the cleaned PDFs, and archive the XFDF files.

flatten-pdf-to-custom-output-directory.title: Flatten PDF and Save to Custom Output Directory
flatten-pdf-to-custom-output-directory.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, flattening its form fields, and saving the flattened file to a user‑specified output folder.

log-original-and-flattened-pdf-file-size.title: Log Original and Flattened PDF File Sizes After Annotation Flattening
log-original-and-flattened-pdf-file-size.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and log the file size before and after the operation for audit purposes.

update-pdf-annotation-subject.title: Update PDF Annotation Subject with PdfAnnotationEditor
update-pdf-annotation-subject.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a TextAnnotation, then using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to change the annotation's Subject property and verifying the change with NUnit.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
batch-delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration that lists annotation types to keep, then removes all other annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from Stream
flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF supplied as a stream and return the modified PDF as a MemoryStream, avoiding any file system access.

flatten-pdf-tag-with-flatten-date.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Flatten Date Metadata
flatten-pdf-tag-with-flatten-date.description: Shows how to flatten a PDF, add a custom metadata entry containing the flattening date, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-logg.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-logg.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and simultaneously log the full XFDF content to a separate log file for diagnostic purposes.

clone-annotation-change-color.title: Clone PDF Annotation, Change Color, and Move to Another Page
clone-annotation-change-color.description: Shows how to clone a text annotation from one page, change its color, and add the cloned annotation to a different page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-process-pdfs-azure-blob.title: Batch Process PDFs from Azure Blob Storage with PdfAnnotationEditor
batch-process-pdfs-azure-blob.description: Shows how to stream PDF files from an Azure Blob container, flatten all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and upload the processed PDFs to another container.

generate-annotation-summary-report.title: Generate Annotation Summary Report for PDFs
generate-annotation-summary-report.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to extract all annotations from PDF files and create a CSV report that lists each annotation type and its count per document.

prevent-flattening-signed-pdf.title: Prevent Flattening of PDFs with Digital Signatures
prevent-flattening-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to detect digital signatures using the PdfFileSignature facade and conditionally flatten a PDF only when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

rename-pdf-annotation-names.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
rename-pdf-annotation-names.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over all pages and their annotations, and rename each annotation using a standardized prefix via the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verbose.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Verbose Logging
flatten-pdf-annotations-verbose.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, flatten all annotations, and save the result, with a '--verbose' command‑line flag for detailed operation logging.

verify-exportannotations-unbound-pdfanno.title: Verify ExportAnnotations throws on unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
verify-exportannotations-unbound-pdfanno.description: Demonstrates how to test that calling ExportAnnotationsToXfdf on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF document throws an exception.

report-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Report PDF Annotations Grouped by Author
report-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: The example opens a PDF, extracts all annotations, groups them by the author (the Title of markup annotations), and prints a summary report showing counts and types per author.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and replace the default XFDF namespace with a custom one required by enterprise XML standards.

pdf-annotation-flattener-service.title: Background Service to Flatten PDF Annotations
pdf-annotation-flattener-service.description: Shows how to monitor a folder for new PDF files and use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations in each document.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotation-.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Annotation Changes
validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotation-.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding it to the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, and running document validation to detect corrupted objects, with a log file output.

export-annotations-xfdf-gzip.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Compress with GZip
export-annotations-xfdf-gzip.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF stream using Aspose.Pdf, then compress the XFDF data with GZip for efficient storage.

import-xfdf-into-pdf-delete-temp.title: Import XFDF into PDF and Delete Temporary File
import-xfdf-into-pdf-delete-temp.description: Demonstrates how to import field data from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, save the updated PDF, and then delete the temporary XFDF file.
